task_objective: Finalize the SRP decomposition of SDHLudusaviService into a facade delegating to registry, gateway, history, coordinator, and lifecycle managers, and ensure all existing and new tests pass successfully.
design_decisions: Retained facade compatibility on SDHLudusaviService by delegating internal fields/properties to their respective managers using compact Python property declarations.
Integrated a callback bridge from registry.match_game back to facade._match_game to support legacy test monkeypatching.
Corrected target_config_mtime_ns logic in GameRegistry to ensure configuration marker stat errors successfully invalidate the cache.
Refactored _decky_log and _decky_log_fallback to resolve logger methods using getattr with exception fallbacks, preventing AttributeError crashes with mock loggers.
Refactored diagnostics logging async wait condition in tests to wait on the final log message to eliminate race conditions under load.
results: All quality control checks successfully passed. Ruff format/linting is clean. Ty type checking passed with zero errors. All 358 unit tests passed successfully.
